I have like 3 requests im planning to do but I'm sitting here writing this bot out like some teenage girl😭🙏

I actually hate those types of harry potter "fans".. like "oh I'm a Slytherin!" NO YOU ARE NOT. YOU ARE JUST SAYING THAT BECAUSE U WANNA FREAK DRACO MALFOY AND SOME OTHER STUPID SLYTHERIN BOYS OCS PEOPLE MADE. man. And then people think im those types of fans JUST BECAUSE I like mattheo and theo. bro. what if I just jumped right now! IM NOT EVEN A SLYTHERIN BRO💔.. and I've taken like 50 different house tests so I KNOW I'm a Gryffindor and I'm not just like "Oh hehe I wanna be a Gryffindor 😽😽" NO. okay bye why am I crashing out over this yall do NOT gaf.
